title: Preview / advanced-preview build rows for the fan-control and TRIAC targets (manual-preview / advanced-manual-preview lanes)
description: Concrete, CI-consumable build-row ledger for the four buildable fan-control and TRIAC PREVIEW / advanced-preview release targets that are delivered on the NON-WebFlash preview lanes. This is the manual-preview / advanced-manual-preview analog of config/webflash-builds.json: it records, per target, the config string, product YAML, delivery lane, preview channel, expected preview artifact name, the policy warning copy + key, the release-note draft path, the stable blocker, the build blocker (now null for all four rows — TRIAC-UNBLOCK-BUILD-001 cleared the FanTRIAC HW-005 BUILDABILITY blocker via the SX1509-free Core respin that routes TRI_GPIO1/TRI_GPIO2 direct to IO14/IO13), the firmware-build compile evidence (FanRelay/FanPWM/FanDAC run 26821900127; FanTRIAC local full compile under TRIAC-UNBLOCK-BUILD-001), and the commercial posture (hidden / not buyable / not recommended / not customer-default / not stable). It cross-references config/preview-release-targets.json (per target_id) and config/manual-firmware-artifacts.json (per candidate id). This file is build-row METADATA only: it publishes no firmware, adds no config/webflash-builds.json row, promotes nothing to stable, claims no bench / compliance / hardware proof (FanTRIAC now carries firmware-build compile proof only), and does not touch the WebFlash repo. config/webflash-builds.json remains the sole WebFlash release-eligibility source of truth. Read by tests/test_preview_fan_triac_build_rows.py and scripts/validate_preview_fan_triac_build_rows.py.

rows.release_note_warning: PREVIEW FIRMWARE — buildable and installable for testers only. This build is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and NOT a customer default. No bench evidence and no compliance is claimed. Flash at your own risk and expect to recover with the rescue/stable firmware.
rows.stable_blocker: Mains-safety / installation-approval / creepage / clearance evidence + competent-person sign-off + GPIO3 strap-pin boot characterisation.

publish_evidence.release_tag_note: Published to the shared v1.0.0-preview preview release — the intended single preview release for all preview artifacts (room-bundle + LED + fan) under RELEASE-PREVIEW-FAN-SHARED-TAG-001. softprops/action-gh-release refreshed the release name/body/checksums (release-metadata refresh, not a release error); the four room-bundle preview .bin stay attached with their SHA256 intact. WebFlash import eligibility is controlled separately by WebFlash import policy and is not implied by presence in this shared release. See docs/release-preview-fan-publish-results.md section 4.

rows.notes: Relay-switched (on/off) bathroom fan via the on-board K1 relay. Buildable PREVIEW release target delivered on the manual-preview lane (config/manual-firmware-artifacts.json candidate 'fanrelay'); WebFlash import stays gated by the fan-token guardrail (catalog webflash_build_matrix stays false). Firmware-build proof only (run 26821900127). Not stable, not recommended, not a customer default, not buyable; mains switching is a competent-person install.

WebFlash import eligibility is controlled separately by WebFlash import policy and is not implied by presence in this shared release. See docs/release-preview-fan-publish-results.md section 4.

Buildable PREVIEW release target delivered on the manual-preview lane (candidate 'fanpwm'); WebFlash import stays gated by the fan-token guardrail. RPM not claimed (rpm_supported: false). Firmware-build proof only (run 26821900127). Not stable, not recommended, not a customer default, not buyable.

rows.notes: 0-10V analog (DAC) fan control for advanced duct fans (e.g. Cloudlift S12). Buildable PREVIEW release target delivered on the manual-preview lane (candidate 'fandac'); WebFlash import stays gated by the fan-token guardrail. Firmware-build proof only (run 26821900127). Not Cloudlift-ready; not stable, not recommended, not a customer default, not buyable.

rows.release_note_warning: ADVANCED PREVIEW — MAINS-VOLTAGE RISK. This firmware drives mains-voltage hardware (e.g. TRIAC phase-control dimming) and is for competent persons performing a manual installation only. It is NOT hardware verified, NOT stable, NOT recommended, and is NEVER a default. No bench evidence and no electrical-safety / compliance certification is claimed. Incorrect installation can cause fire, electric shock, or death. Do not install unless you are qualified to work on mains wiring.
rows.stable_blocker: PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 (operator bench protocol with signed attestation) + experimental-lane preconditions per COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001 (COMPLIANCE-001 CLOSED by market posture — never placed on the market; see docs/decisions/COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001.md).

compile_evidence.ci_dispatch_note: Hosted compile-only.yml (compile_mode=full) is the canonical corroboration lane; workflow_dispatch was not available to the authoring integration, so no hosted CI run id is claimed. A maintainer dispatch of compile-only.yml (or scripts/validate_compile_targets.py --compile) corroborates on hosted CI. No compile is fabricated.

rows.notes: Mains-voltage TRIAC phase-cut dimming. ADVANCED-PREVIEW only, on the advanced-manual-preview lane, behind an explicit advanced acknowledgement gate. TRIAC-UNBLOCK-BUILD-001 resolved the HW-005 BUILDABILITY blocker: the SX1509-free S360-100-R4 Core respin routes TRI_GPIO1/TRI_GPIO2 direct to interrupt-capable ESP32-S3 GPIOs (gate IO14, zero-cross IO13 -- schematic-verified, TRIAC-PINMAP-CORRECT-001), replacing the placeholder GPIO5/GPIO6 that collided with RoomIQ SEN0609 on J10, so ESPHome ac_dimmer can attach its interrupt/ISR. buildable_now is true and the target carries a real local full-compile (ESPHome 2026.4.5; success). Still NOT forced into the normal WebFlash preview path; never stable, recommended, default, required-config, buyable, or WebFlash-importable. Publish stays gated by PACKAGE-TRIAC-001 (signed attestation) + the COMPLIANCE-001-RESOLUTION-001 experimental-lane preconditions (COMPLIANCE-001 closed by market posture); no bench / EMI / thermal / safety / compliance proof is claimed. Publishing the advanced-manual-preview artifact is the follow-up TRIAC-PUBLISH-ADVANCED-PREVIEW-001, owned by the commissioning PR.
